introSection: Kiddie Tickler, also referred to as Tickler, was a wooden spinning roller coaster built by American firm W.F. Mangels Company that was previously located at Kennywood in West Mifflin, Pennsylvania, USA. It was the only miniature version of the Virginia Reel built by the company.
fullText: Kiddie Tickler, also referred to as Tickler, was a wooden spinning roller coaster built by American firm W.F. Mangels Company that was previously located at Kennywood in West Mifflin, Pennsylvania, USA. It was the only miniature version of the Virginia Reel built by the company.
